name: luma
description: Reads and writes the documented Luma public API for events, calendars, guests, contacts, tags, coupons, ticket types, memberships, webhooks, and organization resources.

risk.read: external Luma public API read of calendar, event, guest, contact, tag, coupon, ticket, membership, webhook, and organization data
risk.write: live Luma API mutations can create, update, invite, tag, cancel, transfer, or delete event/calendar/member/webhook data and may send guest invitations
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan, preview, approval token, and destructive confirmation for delete/cancel/invite/transfer operations
